comment: Canonical mapping of milestone → (commits, docs, Linear issues). Update this file at end-of-milestone; run scripts/sync_linear_github_v1.py to validate and emit Linear-ready summaries. Adding a milestone entry: append to milestones array, list commits + result/runbook docs + Linear issue IDs.

milestones.title: HumanEval-70B-Reflexion-K=5 same-budget multi-agent superiority retirement
milestones.outcome: RETIRED — first confirmed same-budget multi-agent superiority retirement (+5.56 pp B over A1, 2-of-3 per-seed majority)

milestones.title: Preflight-first empirical superiority wave (5-gate harness; 3 candidate kills; no expensive bench)
milestones.outcome: DISCIPLINE — preflight infrastructure landed; 3 candidates killed in cheap evidence; no NIM spend

milestones.title: Preflight-earned K=10 pilot killed; cross-modal pivot to MathVista documented
milestones.outcome: KILLED — K=10 pilot ceiling-saturated A1 to 100% on 15-problem slice; 3-of-6 pre-committed gates failed; HumanEval-Visual K=5 retired as cross-modal battlefield; MathVista selected as W95 line

milestones.title: MathVista cross-modal: preflight + Phase 2 cheap pilot (9/9 gates PASS; B beats A1 by +10 pp at K=5 on Llama-3.2-11B-Vision; Phase 3 preflight-earned but not launched)
milestones.outcome: PHASE 2 PILOT PASSES — A0=36.67% / A1=66.67% / B=76.67%; B-A1=+10pp; B-A0=+40pp; B≥A1 on 27/30 problems; 14/14 audit re-derivations + gates PASS offline; Phase 3 entitled per RUNBOOK_W95
